assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 extracts the Upstream Affected Component (webpack) from customfield_10632 and uses it to search for related CVE Jiras (§1.59)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 15-18 show 'Upstream Affected Component (customfield_10632) | webpack' in the current issue component data table. Lines 22-26 show the JQL query 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND cf[10632] ~ "webpack" AND key != TC-8011', which explicitly uses cf[10632] (customfield_10632) with value 'webpack' to search for related CVE Jiras.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 filters search results by matching PS Component (customfield_10669 = pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui) and Stream (customfield_10832 = rhtpa-2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 36-41 show an explicit filtering step where TC-8012 is checked against all three fields: 'PS Component: pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui (matches)' and 'Stream: rhtpa-2.2 (matches)'. The filtering section confirms TC-8012 passes the filter on both PS Component (customfield_10669) and Stream (customfield_10832).

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 traverses issuelinks on TC-8012 to find remediation task TC-8013 via the 'Depend' link type
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 44-50 show 'Inspecting TC-8012's issue links for linked remediation Tasks (link type "Depend"):' followed by 'TC-8013 -- "Bump webpack to 5.96.1 in rhtpa-ui [rhtpa-2.2]"' with its status and description. The traversal explicitly uses the 'Depend' link type to find TC-8013.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 compares the remediation task's bump version (5.96.1) against the current CVE's fix threshold (5.98.0) and determines the fix does NOT cover this CVE
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 54-56 present a Coverage Comparison table with columns 'Remediation Task | Bump Version | Current CVE Fix Threshold | Covers This CVE?' showing 'TC-8013 | 5.96.1 | 5.98.0 | No (5.96.1 < 5.98.0)'. Line 58 states: 'Since 5.96.1 is below the fix threshold of 5.98.0, the existing remediation does not cover this CVE.'

assertion_results.text: The overlap table is presented to the engineer showing TC-8012 and TC-8013 with 'Covers This CVE? = No' — the triage proceeds to create new remediation tasks rather than recommending closure
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 63-68 present the conclusion table: 'CVE-2026-43210 | TC-8012 | TC-8013 | 5.96.1 | No (threshold: 5.98.0)' followed by 'No existing remediation covers this CVE's fix threshold. Proceeding with new remediation task creation.' triage-outcome.md line 5 confirms 'Decision: Case A -- Affected. Create new remediation tasks.' and lines 39-53 detail the new remediation plan with two new tasks (upstream backport and downstream propagation).
